title: Properly Optimized // [UPDATE]
description:
Breathe new life into Minecraft! This performance-focused modpack boosts your FPS making the game smoother and more playable on both old and new PCs. Rediscover the joy of 
(almost) lag-free adventures!
body:
# About the modpack
A modpack made with most optimization mods that'll make your experience better.

Instead of playing minecraft at 10 to 15 FPS on the newer versions, you can use this modpack to enhance your framerates, and play much smoother, and even with some extra features (all client-side, works on servers). Personally, as someone who loves to play with lots of people and see the chaos of servers, I would recommend this kind of modpack for people who want to play in servers, mainly those with hundreds of players and things to do, that causes lag on weaker pcs, which was one of the main reasons I made this modpack, enhance expericience on servers.
Also included in newer versions of P.O. (1.1.0 and 1.2.0), we have resourcepacks that enhance textures of blocks, grass, GUI and overall quality of life, not necessary, but aesthetically useful.

I'm not saying your pc is weak, what I'm saying is that every player deserves to run minecraft at good framerates.

I created this pack by using some mods you may know, like:
- Sodium and extras
- Essential
- Ferrite core (memory)
- Iris for shaders
- Ambient sounds

## Other
This modpack also includes some simple mods for particles and sounds that enhance the experience and ambience on minecraft, fell free to modify the pack to make your own style out of it.

Some of the little changes:
- Ambience sounds (breaking blocks, rain, birds)
- Particles for water, effects and trees.
- Included resourcepacks for enhanced graphics and playability (don't make much difference on performance, can be disabled if wanted).
